name: MyFastway Shipping Option Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This support article requires the "}, {"text": "Neto Commerce Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "MyFastway Shipping Wizard"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up MyFastway as a shipping option using your account rates:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Set Up Shipping Carrier Based Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and in the pop-up box click "}, {"text": "I Have This Info, Continue Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Fastway", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Carrier Account Name", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "My Fastway Client ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "My Fastway Secret", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This information can be found in your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.aramex.com.au/hc/en-us/articles/360001154895-Does-MyFastway-offer-any-API-integration-", "children": [{"text": "MyFastway account"}]}, {"text": ". Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which services you want to offer. Click "}, {"text": "Show All Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " to see a full list. Click the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button once complete."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping services and give them a description. This information will be visible to customers on your website. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping options should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers And Staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). You can also configure if delivery to PO Boxes is available. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To set different options for each service, click the "}, {"text": "Apply Visibility And PO Box Delivery Settings For Selected Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " box."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now add a "}, {"text": "Discount Incentive", "bold": true}, {"text": " when a customer orders a certain amount. These are optional, set them if you wish and then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which type of printer you will use to print shipping labels, and click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review your settings. You can still make any changes by going back to the relevant section. If you're happy with the settings, click "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your shipping options for MyFastway are now set up. We recommend putting all MyFastway services in the same "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1617-display-the-cheapest-shipping-option-to-customers", "children": [{"text": "routing group"}]}, {"text": " so that only the cheapest applicable service shows to your customers."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For all carrier shipping options we also recommend "}, {"text": "setting backup rates"}, {"text": " in case the carrier's API suffers an outage."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Maximum lengths should be added to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1223-add-or-edit-shipping-rates", "children": [{"text": "rate tables"}]}, {"text": " for Fastway Satchel services, based on the services limits."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "MyFastway Shipping Labels"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Your pickup address is set in your MyFastway account, rather than in the shipping labels."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up MyFastway labels install the Neto ship add-on and fill in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup Form"}]}, {"text": " and Neto staff will set up the shipping labels for you for free."}]}]
